title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brookfield India REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
